scripts.install:all: npm install && cd whole/backend && npm install && cd ../guest-app && npm install && cd ../admin-dashboard && npm install
scripts.build:all: cd whole/backend && npm run build && cd ../guest-app && npm run build && cd ../admin-dashboard && npm run build
scripts.prisma:generate: npm run sync:schemas && cd whole/backend && npx prisma generate && cd ../guest-app && npx prisma generate && cd ../../netlify/functions && npx prisma generate
